pairs.subject: Upcoming HR Training Session
pairs.desc:
Dear Team,

We are excited to announce an upcoming training session on workplace safety scheduled for next Thursday at 10 AM in the main conference room. This training is mandatory for all employees and will cover essential safety protocols and emergency procedures.

Please find the attached document with all the details regarding the training session. Make sure to review it before attending.

Best regards,

HR Team
pairs.explain: This email is from the HR department and contains a legitimate attachment related to a training session.

pairs.subject: Mandatory HR Training - Action Required
pairs.desc:
Dear Employee,

You are required to complete the attached training session by the end of the week. Failure to do so may result in disciplinary action. Click on the attachment to begin.

Regards,

HR Department
pairs.explain: This email contains an executable attachment, which is a common tactic used in phishing attacks.

pairs.subject: Quarterly Financial Report
pairs.desc:
Hello Team,

Attached you will find the quarterly financial report for your review. Please take some time to go through the document and prepare any questions you may have for our upcoming meeting.

Thank you for your attention.

Best,

Finance Department
pairs.explain: The email is from the finance department and contains a legitimate PDF report attachment.

pairs.subject: Important Invoice Attached - Immediate Action Required
pairs.desc:
Dear Employee,

Please find the attached invoice that needs your immediate attention. It is crucial that you review and process this document as soon as possible to avoid any penalties.

Thank you,

Finance Team
pairs.explain: This email has an executable attachment disguised as an invoice, which is typical of phishing attempts.

pairs.subject: IT System Maintenance Notification
pairs.desc:
Dear All,

We would like to inform you about the scheduled maintenance for our IT systems this weekend. During this time, access to certain services may be interrupted. Please find the maintenance schedule attached for your reference.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best,

IT Department
pairs.explain: This email is a legitimate notification from the IT department with a relevant attachment.

pairs.subject: Urgent IT Update Required - Download Now
pairs.desc:
Hello,

We have detected a security issue that requires your immediate attention. Please download the attached file and run it to update your system.

Failure to comply may result in data loss.

Regards,

IT Support
pairs.explain: The email prompts the user to download a potentially harmful executable file, characteristic of phishing.

pairs.subject: Travel Expense Reimbursement
pairs.desc:
Dear Employee,

Attached is your travel expense reimbursement report for your recent trip. Please review the details and let us know if you have any questions or concerns.

Best regards,

Travel Department
pairs.explain: The email is from the travel department and includes a legitimate PDF attachment.

pairs.subject: Travel Reimbursement - Action Needed
pairs.desc:
Dear Employee,

You have an outstanding travel reimbursement that needs to be processed. Please fill out the attached form and return it as soon as possible.

Thank you,

Travel Team
pairs.explain: The email contains an executable attachment disguised as a form, which is a common phishing tactic.

pairs.subject: Legal Document Review
pairs.desc:
Hello,

Please find attached the legal documents that require your review. It is important that you go through them and provide your feedback by the end of the week.

Best,

Legal Department
pairs.explain: This email is a legitimate request from the legal department with a relevant document attached.

pairs.subject: Urgent Legal Document - Open Immediately
pairs.desc:
Dear Employee,

You have an urgent legal document that requires your immediate attention. Please open the attached file to review it.

Regards,

Legal Team
pairs.explain: The email includes an executable attachment, which is a common phishing method to compromise systems.
